What famous line does Prince Aemond say to his mother, Alicent, when he loses his eye in House of the Dragon?

options.A: "Do not mourn me, Mother. It was a fair exchange. I may have lost an eye, but I gained a dragon."
options.B: "Weep not for me, Mother. I have paid the iron price. My eye for a dragon is a bargain well made."
options.C: "Be at peace, Mother. This was destiny. I sacrificed an eye, but the gods gave me a dragon."
options.D: "Fear not, Mother. The pain is nothing compared to what I've won. An eye is a small price for a dragon."
